name: GT-bhsa-complete
source: B(H)_sa is a complete order-unit space. HOS 3.1.2 (refs/hos/joa-m.md:2300): B(H)_sa with operator norm is a JB/JC algebra; HOS 3.3.10 (joa-m.md:2552): a unital JB algebra is a complete order-unit space whose order norm equals the given norm; order unit I (HOS 1.2.1/1.3.2). Hence B(H)_sa is a Banach space in the order norm.
